meaning: n.[遏ｿ] 邊礼ｲ堤私豁ｦ蟯ｩ,霎臥ｻｿ蟯ｩ
examples: At Scinto 6 uranium occurs in much altered dolerite below the unconformity.
The micro-gabbro phase is identical with the typical bulawayan dolerite sills.
The lavas mainly include basalt, dolerite, fumarolic, amygdaloidal andesite, trachy-andesite and as well as rhyolite.
The granite is seamed with dolerite, chipped away by prehistoric Channel Islanders to make axeheads and arrowtips.
Set a week aside for a 40-mile hike through stunning dolerite mountains, temperate rainforest and alpine plains.
